Off Calendar May-04-2016 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
